title: hieracium brevifolium subsp. brevifolium
intro: Hieracium brevifolium subsp. brevifolium, also known as the small-leaved hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family native to Europe. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Hieracium brevifolium subsp. brevifolium include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote healing, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
